title: Parakord's Propolis
description: My first released mod that adds propolis mechanics from the Bloomy Minecraft server.
body:
With this mod, you no longer have to worry about reparing your items, because now there is propolis! Using a feather, a gold ingot and a stick, you can craft a **golden brush** ( or more expensive diamond and netherite variants ). Using a brush, by right clicking on a flower, you will extract **pollen** from it. By combining pollen and honeycombs in a crafting grid, you will get **propolis** itself! By pressing right button with propolis, while holding the broken item in your secondary hand, you will restore 24 durability to it. There is also a **propolis clump** in fashion, capable of repairing 216 durability at a time.

[👉 Texture and idea author 👈](https://taplink.cc/bedno)
